2606.08397.title: TrustMargin: Training-Free Arbitration between Parametric Memory and Retrieved Evidence in Large Language Models
2606.08397.paper_summary: Large language models answer knowledge-intensive questions using both parametric memory and retrieved evidence, but neither source is uniformly reliable. Retrieval can fill knowledge gaps, yet distracting passages may override correct closed-book answers. We study this post-generation conflict as answer-level source arbitration: given Direct and RAG answers from the same frozen model, decide which source to trust. We propose TRUSTMARGIN, a training-free, plug-and-play arbitration layer that scores the two existing candidates with the model's own likelihoods. It combines a parametric-prior margin, which tests whether memory accepts the retrieved answer, with an evidence-binding margin, which discounts passage-only salience and measures question-specific support. TRUSTMARGIN selects between Direct and RAG without fine-tuning, external judges, or additional generation. Across 2WIKIMQA and CWQA with three LLaMA scales, TRUSTMARGIN consistently improves over Direct generation and BM25-RAG, recovers part of the Direct/RAG oracle gap, and generalizes to multiple training-free RAG pipelines.
2606.08397.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型使用參數記憶和檢索證據來回答知識密集型問題，但這兩種來源都不是均勻可靠的。檢索可以填補知識空白，但分心的段落可能會覆蓋正確的閉卷答案。我們將這種生成後的衝突研究為答案級來源仲裁：給定來自同一凍結模型的直接答案和RAG答案，決定信任哪個來源。我們提出了TRUSTMARGIN，一個無需訓練的即插即用仲裁層，使用模型自身的可能性對兩個現有候選者進行評分。它結合了一個參數先驗邊際，測試記憶是否接受檢索的答案，以及一個證據綁定邊際，該邊際折扣段落僅的顯著性並測量問題特定的支持。TRUSTMARGIN在不進行微調、外部評審或額外生成的情況下，在直接和RAG之間進行選擇。在2WIKIMQA和CWQA的三個LLaMA規模上，TRUSTMARGIN始終優於直接生成和BM25-RAG，恢復了部分直接/RAG神諭的差距，並且能夠推廣到多個無需訓練的RAG管道。
2606.08397.author: Jingyan Xu et.al.
2606.08397.authors: Jingyan Xu, Hong Shi, Yi Shan, Penghui Liu, Yunhao Bai, Ningyuan Li, Xueyang Liu
